hero.title: The bot that guards your server day and night
hero.subtitle: Coco stops nuke attacks in seconds, catches scam messages instantly with AI, and locks your server into full isolation with a single command.

features.title: Everything a security team would do, automated
features.f1desc: The moment a channel or role deletion is detected, the attacker is stripped of permissions and every change is rolled back automatically.
features.f2desc: Our Gemini-powered scanner recognizes profanity, scams, and phishing in dozens of languages instantly and removes the message.
features.f3desc: One button disables webhooks, locks channels, freezes permissions, and puts your server into full isolation.
features.f4desc: Takes regular backups of your server and restores channels and roles to their previous state with a single click after an attack.
features.f5desc: Toggle protection modules, adjust thresholds, and watch the live audit log directly from an in-command panel.
features.f6desc: AI that understands abbreviations, letter tricks, and mixed languages — nothing slips through unnoticed.

commands.title: Every command, read live from the source
commands.subtitle: This page reads the bot's /commands folder directly; when a new command is added, it appears here automatically.

statistics.title: What is Coco doing right now?
statistics.subtitle: All data is pulled from the bot itself in real time and refreshes every second.

dashboard.title: Dashboard is on its way
dashboard.subtitle: We're building an advanced control panel so you can manage your server right from the browser.

footer.tagline: The one light keeping watch in the dark.
